name: Creamy Mocha Frozen Dessert
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese until it is fluffy.
2. Beat in the sweetened condensed milk, chocolate syrup, and coffee dissolved in hot water until smooth.
3. Fold in the frozen whipped topping.
4. Pour the mixture into the prepared crust.
5. Garnish with pecans.
6. Freeze overnight or until firm.
